title: Approaches to human resource management (HRM)
summary: 9609 A Level — hard vs soft HRM and strategic HRM.
learningObjectives: Analyse HR as cost vs asset.

simpleExplanation.title: People as cost or asset
simpleExplanation.summary: Hard HRM treats labour as a flexible cost to control. Soft HRM invests in development and participation for competitive advantage.
steps: Strategic HRM links HR to objectives.

sections.content: **HRM approaches** (7.4.1) completes **Topic 7**. Link back to **2.1 AS HRM** at greater depth.
